PreToolUse.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
input_data = json.load(sys.stdin)
params = input_data.get('tool_input', {})
path = params.get('filePath', params.get('path', ''))
patterns = [
    r'(^|/)\.env$',
    r'(^|/)\.env\.',
    r'\.npmrc$',
    r'\.keystore$',
    r'\.jks$',
    r'\.p12$',
    r'\.pfx$',
    r'\.pem$',
    r'\.key$',
    r'(^|/)id_rsa$',
    r'(^|/)id_ed25519$',
    r'(^|/)id_ecdsa$',
    r'(^|/)id_dsa$',
    r'(^|/)\.aws/credentials$',
    r'credentials\.json$',
    r'serviceAccountKey\.json$'
]
if any(re.search(p, path) for p in patterns):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'deny', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'Sensitive file excluded for security: ' + path}}))
    sys.exit(0)
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'allow'}}))
"
